Functions to enable or disable Bluetooth LE and classic pairability.

# Purpose
This header file declares two functions related to Bluetooth driver pairability settings. The function [`bt_driver_le_pairability_set_enabled`](<#bt_driver_le_pairability_set_enabled>) is used to enable or disable pairability for Bluetooth Low Energy (LE) devices by accepting a boolean parameter `enabled`. Similarly, the function [`bt_driver_classic_pairability_set_enabled`](<#bt_driver_classic_pairability_set_enabled>) controls the pairability for classic Bluetooth devices, also using a boolean parameter. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` allows the use of the `bool` data type for these functions. The `#pragma once` directive ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
